task_description: Construct philosophical arguments based on historical texts
justification: AI can generate drafts and retrieve historical context, but the originality of the argument and the validity of the philosophical stance require human judgment.

task_description: Interpret complex philosophical texts and concepts
justification: LLMs excel at parsing syntax and semantics, yet deep hermeneutic understanding and context-aware interpretation remain human strengths.

task_description: Evaluate and compare conflicting philosophical theories
justification: AI can list differences, but the normative evaluation and synthesis of conflicting worldviews require human critical thinking.

task_description: Design research frameworks for science and technology studies
justification: AI lacks the ability to formulate novel epistemological questions or ethical frameworks for emerging technologies without human guidance.

task_description: Publish peer-reviewed academic papers and monographs
justification: AI significantly improves writing speed and formatting, but the intellectual contribution and academic integrity are human responsibilities.

task_description: Mentor graduate students and supervise thesis work
justification: AI cannot replicate the emotional support, ethical guidance, and nuanced feedback required for academic mentorship.

task_description: Collaborate with interdisciplinary research teams
justification: Human negotiation and trust-building are essential for interdisciplinary collaboration, though AI can facilitate data sharing.

task_description: Manage research archives and bibliographic databases
justification: This is a highly routine data management task easily automated by AI agents with minimal human oversight.

task_description: Document case history and maintain confidential client records
justification: Administrative documentation is easily automated via NLP, though data privacy governance remains a human responsibility.

task_description: Coordinate resources and referrals to external support agencies
justification: AI can match resources efficiently, but establishing trust-based partnerships with agencies requires human negotiation.

task_description: Monitor client progress and adjust intervention strategies
justification: AI can track metrics, but interpreting subtle behavioral changes and adjusting therapeutic tone requires human empathy.

task_description: Prepare and submit regulatory compliance reports
justification: Standardized reporting is highly automatable with minimal human intervention needed for formatting and submission.

task_description: Conduct crisis intervention and immediate safety assessments
justification: High-stakes crisis situations demand immediate human judgment and physical presence; AI can only provide decision support.

task_description: Maintain professional ethics and confidentiality standards
justification: Ethical adherence is an intrinsic human moral obligation that cannot be delegated to or augmented by AI systems.

task_description: 制定社会组织战略规划
justification: 战略规划需结合复杂的社会伦理与利益相关者博弈，AI 无法独立判断价值取向，但可辅助数据建模。

task_description: 执行项目全流程管理
justification: 流程监控与资源调度可高度自动化，但突发危机处理与人际协调仍需人工介入。

task_description: 开展多元化筹资活动
justification: AI 可优化捐赠者画像与渠道分析，但建立深层信任关系与情感共鸣依赖人类互动。

task_description: 策划并执行公益项目活动
justification: 活动创意与现场调度可借助 AI 生成方案，但现场突发状况应对与志愿者情绪安抚需人工主导。

task_description: 撰写项目申请与结项报告

task_description: 维护利益相关者沟通网络
justification: 沟通策略可辅助生成，但建立长期信任与处理复杂人际冲突必须依赖人类社交直觉。

task_description: 监测项目财务与合规数据

task_description: 整理组织档案与知识库

task_description: 评估社区需求与反馈

task_description: Conduct clinical interviews to assess client psychological status

task_description: Administer and interpret standardized psychological assessment tools
justification: Scoring and basic interpretation of psychometric tests are highly automatable and accurate via algorithms.

task_description: Formulate and implement individualized psychotherapy intervention plans
justification: AI can suggest evidence-based protocols, but the dynamic adaptation to client emotional shifts requires human intuition.

task_description: Establish and maintain therapeutic alliance through empathic communication
justification: Genuine empathy and the therapeutic bond are inherently human traits that AI cannot authentically replicate.

task_description: Monitor client progress and adjust treatment goals dynamically
justification: AI can track data trends, but clinical judgment on when to pivot strategies relies on human experience.

task_description: Document clinical sessions and maintain confidential case records
justification: Transcription and structured note-taking are easily handled by AI, though ethical redaction remains human.

task_description: Provide crisis intervention and suicide risk assessment
justification: AI can flag risk keywords, but immediate life-saving decisions and emotional containment require human presence.

task_description: Collaborate with medical professionals on multidisciplinary care
justification: Data sharing and coordination can be automated, but negotiating complex care plans requires human diplomacy.

task_description: Conduct professional supervision and peer consultation

task_description: Research and update clinical knowledge with current evidence

task_description: Execute high-speed text entry from source materials
justification: Pure transcription is highly automatable via OCR and speech-to-text; AI handles the bulk of input with near-perfect accuracy.

task_description: Apply formatting standards to structured documents
justification: Style guides and templates can be encoded into AI agents, though complex layout adjustments may require human oversight.

task_description: Verify text accuracy against original source documents
justification: AI can highlight discrepancies, but human judgment is often needed to resolve context-dependent errors or ambiguous source text.

task_description: Maintain sustained focus during repetitive data entry
justification: AI does not suffer from fatigue, making it superior for long-duration repetitive tasks, though human monitoring ensures quality control.

task_description: Coordinate hand-eye movements for precise keystroke execution
justification: Physical typing mechanics are fully replaceable by software input methods; the human motor skill is obsolete in the AI context.

task_description: Resolve ambiguous source text or illegible handwriting
justification: AI struggles with poor quality inputs; human intervention is required to interpret context and make logical inferences.

task_description: Manage confidential document handling protocols
justification: While AI can encrypt data, the ethical and legal responsibility for confidentiality often requires human accountability and judgment.

task_description: Communicate document status to supervisors or clients
justification: Status updates can be automated, but nuanced communication regarding delays or errors often requires human empathy and negotiation.

task_description: Organize physical and digital filing systems
justification: Digital organization is easily automated; physical filing requires manual dexterity and spatial awareness not easily replicated by software.

task_description: Adapt to changing software interfaces and tools
justification: AI agents can be retrained on new interfaces faster than humans, but human adaptability remains valuable for unique, non-standard software environments.

task_description: Execute real-time stenographic transcription of spoken dialogue
justification: AI can transcribe audio with high accuracy, but struggles with simultaneous multi-speaker disambiguation and immediate context correction in noisy environments.

task_description: Apply specialized stenography keyboard shortcuts and coding systems
justification: The physical dexterity and muscle memory required for high-speed manual stenography are difficult to replicate with current voice-to-text AI latency.

task_description: Monitor audio quality and speaker identity in real-time
justification: AI struggles to distinguish overlapping voices or identify speakers without prior training data, requiring human auditory filtering.

task_description: Resolve terminology and context ambiguities during live sessions
justification: While GenAI can guess context, real-time decision-making on technical jargon or slang requires human domain expertise and immediate judgment.

task_description: Maintain high concentration and emotional stability under pressure
justification: Human psychological resilience and sustained focus are critical for long-duration high-stakes recording, which AI lacks in terms of 'stress' management.

task_description: Post-process and format raw transcripts for official records
justification: AI excels at formatting, grammar correction, and structuring text, making this task highly automatable.

task_description: Manage equipment setup and troubleshoot technical failures
justification: Physical interaction with hardware and immediate troubleshooting of audio feed issues still require human intervention.

task_description: Coordinate with speakers to clarify unclear statements
justification: Interpersonal negotiation and reading social cues to ask for clarification are inherently human social skills.

task_description: Archive and retrieve historical records according to protocol
justification: Database management and retrieval are fully automatable with current search and storage technologies.

task_description: Ensure confidentiality and ethical compliance of recorded data
justification: Ethical judgment and handling sensitive information require human accountability and legal understanding beyond simple data encryption.

task_description: Execute CAD operations to generate technical drawings
justification: CAD operations are highly automatable; AI can generate geometry and layers with near-perfect accuracy, reducing human execution time significantly.

task_description: Apply drafting standards to ensure compliance
justification: Rule-based standards can be encoded into AI validators, though human oversight is needed for ambiguous or evolving industry codes.

task_description: Interpret engineering requirements into visual schematics
justification: AI struggles with abstract interpretation of vague engineering intent; humans bridge the gap between text specs and visual logic.

task_description: Verify spatial relationships and dimensional accuracy
justification: Spatial checking is computationally feasible but requires human judgment to resolve conflicts in complex 3D assemblies.

task_description: Collaborate with engineers to resolve design conflicts
justification: Conflict resolution involves negotiation, trust, and understanding unspoken constraints, which are inherently human social tasks.

task_description: Trace and refine existing hand-drawn sketches
justification: Digitizing irregular hand sketches requires pattern recognition that AI can assist with, but human correction is needed for artistic nuances.

task_description: Archive and manage drawing version control
justification: File management and versioning are routine administrative tasks easily handled by automated database systems.

task_description: Prepare final documentation for production teams
justification: Formatting and annotation require understanding the end-user's needs, blending AI formatting with human context.

task_description: Maintain physical drawing equipment and software licenses
justification: Hardware maintenance is physical but routine; software licensing is administrative and easily automated.

task_description: Consult on feasibility of proposed design changes
justification: Feasibility consulting requires deep domain intuition and accountability that AI cannot currently assume.

task_description: Manage kitchen workflow and staff coordination

task_description: Maintain kitchen hygiene and safety standards

task_description: Interact with customers to gather feedback

task_description: Document recipes and update inventory logs

task_description: Clean and sanitize kitchen equipment

task_description: Design customized meal plans based on nutritional principles

task_description: Calculate nutritional values and portion sizes

task_description: Evaluate ingredient properties and seasonal availability
justification: AI lacks real-time sensory evaluation of freshness and local market nuances requiring physical inspection.

task_description: Monitor client progress and modify nutritional strategies
justification: Data tracking is automated, but interpreting physiological responses and adjusting for non-dietary factors needs human oversight.

task_description: Research new food trends and nutritional guidelines

task_description: Curate tea selection based on guest preferences

task_description: Maintain tea ceremony environment and equipment hygiene
justification: Cleaning can be automated, but the aesthetic arrangement and immediate response to spills require human presence and judgment.

task_description: Demonstrate tea brewing techniques to visitors
justification: Visual demonstration relies on physical dexterity and stage presence, which are difficult for robots to replicate authentically.

task_description: Resolve guest complaints regarding taste or service

task_description: Record inventory levels and order supplies
justification: Inventory management is highly data-driven and easily automated with minimal human intervention required.

task_description: Adapt service style to cultural context of event

task_description: Document tea tasting notes and feedback

task_description: Execute sensory evaluation of tea samples
justification: Human sensory perception (taste/smell) remains the core bottleneck for AI; AI can assist in data logging and pattern recognition but cannot replace the biological sensory organ.

task_description: Determine tea quality grade based on standards
justification: AI can compare sensory data against vast databases of historical grades, but final certification requires human liability and contextual judgment of subtle defects.

task_description: Analyze processing parameters affecting flavor profile
justification: AI excels at correlating chemical data with sensory outcomes, yet the causal inference regarding specific processing nuances still relies on expert intuition.

task_description: Document sensory evaluation results and defect descriptions
justification: Highly text-heavy and structured; Generative AI can draft reports and transcribe sensory notes with high accuracy, significantly reducing administrative time.

task_description: Verify tea origin and production authenticity
justification: Combines sensory verification with supply chain knowledge; AI can analyze traceability data, but the final authenticity judgment relies on human expertise.

task_description: Communicate tasting notes to producers and buyers
justification: AI can generate descriptive language and translate terms, but the negotiation and trust-building aspect of communicating quality issues requires human presence.

task_description: Calibrate sensory evaluation environment and equipment
justification: Standardized protocols can be automated, but the physical setup of the tasting room and calibration of human senses require human oversight.

task_description: Update industry knowledge and sensory standards
justification: Information retrieval and literature review are highly automatable; AI can summarize new standards and trends efficiently.

task_description: Maintain professional sensory acuity through training
justification: Biological maintenance of taste/smell sensitivity is inherently human; AI can suggest training regimens but cannot perform the biological adaptation.

task_description: Prepare tea samples for sensory testing
justification: Physical preparation involves manual dexterity and adherence to strict brewing protocols; AI can guide the process but cannot physically brew the tea.

task_description: Execute sensory evaluation of raw materials and finished products
justification: Human sensory perception (taste/smell) remains the primary bottleneck for AI; AI can assist in data logging and pattern recognition but cannot replace the biological sensory organ.

task_description: Design and formulate new beverage recipes based on target profiles
justification: AI can generate formula combinations and predict chemical interactions, but the final creative selection and aesthetic judgment rely on human intuition and cultural context.

task_description: Conduct blind tasting panels to validate product consistency
justification: While AI can analyze chemical composition, the subjective 'acceptance' and 'emotional resonance' of a taste profile require human consensus and cannot be fully automated.

task_description: Analyze chemical composition and stability data of alcohol blends
justification: Highly data-driven and rule-based; AI excels at processing spectral data and predicting stability, making it highly substitutable for the analytical portion of this task.

task_description: Document and archive sensory evaluation results and formulation history
justification: Purely administrative and data-entry heavy; AI agents can autonomously manage databases and generate reports with near-zero human intervention.

task_description: Interpret consumer feedback and market trends to adjust product strategy
justification: AI can process large datasets of consumer reviews, but the strategic translation of vague emotional feedback into concrete product changes requires human business acumen.

task_description: Collaborate with production teams to scale up laboratory formulas
justification: Scaling involves physical constraints and interpersonal negotiation; AI can simulate scaling parameters but cannot physically manage the production floor or negotiate with engineers.

task_description: Research emerging flavor trends and raw material innovations
justification: Information retrieval is highly augmentable by AI, but the curation of 'emerging' trends often relies on human cultural foresight and networking.

task_description: Ensure regulatory compliance of ingredients and labeling
justification: Regulatory rules are static and codified; AI can easily cross-reference ingredient lists against legal databases to ensure compliance.

task_description: Maintain and calibrate sensory evaluation equipment and storage conditions
justification: Physical maintenance of equipment requires human dexterity and judgment, though AI can monitor environmental sensors and schedule maintenance.

justification: Substitutivity is low due to the need for fine motor control and artistic intuition on irregular surfaces; Augmentation is high as AI can assist with pattern generation and color matching.

task_description: Execute precise transfer printing on curved objects
justification: Low substitutivity because aligning flat transfers on complex 3D curves requires tactile feedback and real-time adjustment; AI augments by providing alignment guides.

task_description: Construct and refine ceramic sculptural elements
justification: Very low substitutivity due to the physical manipulation of clay and artistic judgment required for 3D forms; AI serves as a design assistant but cannot physically sculpt.

task_description: Evaluate aesthetic quality and color consistency
justification: Moderate substitutivity as AI vision systems can detect color flaws, but human aesthetic judgment remains crucial for artistic intent; AI significantly augments inspection speed.

task_description: Prepare ceramic substrates for decoration
justification: Low substitutivity due to the need to assess surface texture and porosity manually; AI can optimize preparation parameters but cannot execute the physical prep.

task_description: Select and mix ceramic glazes and pigments

task_description: Maintain and calibrate decoration equipment
justification: Moderate substitutivity as predictive maintenance is possible, but physical repair often requires human dexterity; AI enhances diagnostic capabilities.

task_description: Document production records and quality logs
justification: High substitutivity and augmentation as data entry and logging are easily automated by AI agents with minimal human oversight.

task_description: Collaborate with designers on custom patterns
justification: Low substitutivity due to the need for creative negotiation and trust; AI acts as a collaborative tool for rapid prototyping.

task_description: Dispose of hazardous chemical waste safely

task_description: Select and prepare clay materials

task_description: Shape clay into molds manually

task_description: Apply glaze to ceramic forms

task_description: Control kiln firing temperature cycles

task_description: Inspect finished glazed products for defects

task_description: Design glaze color formulas

justification: AI can automate machine control (high A), but physical material handling and real-time defect sensing require human oversight (low S).

justification: Automated calibration is possible, but troubleshooting complex mechanical failures and interpreting ambiguous test data requires human reasoning.

task_description: Adhere to safety protocols and environmental regulations
justification: AI can monitor sensors, but human judgment is required to respond to unexpected safety hazards and enforce compliance culture.

task_description: Train new apprentices on manual handling techniques
justification: Mentorship and tacit knowledge transfer regarding 'feel' and 'dexterity' cannot be fully replicated by AI agents.

justification: Reading and applying technical documentation is increasingly supported by AI vision and NLP, though context-specific decision-making remains human-led.

justification: Safety communication involves trust, situational awareness, and liability that cannot be delegated to autonomous agents.

justification: Data entry and logging are highly susceptible to AI automation and digital record-keeping systems.

justification: Visual inspection of tools can be aided by AI, but the physical handling and decision to replace parts require human oversight.

justification: Routine cleaning and waste disposal are repetitive tasks increasingly handled by automated cleaning robots or simplified workflows.

justification: Escalation involves judgment on severity and responsibility, requiring human accountability and communication.

justification: Assembly requires spatial reasoning to fit parts in tight, non-standard gaps and physical strength to position heavy components. AI assists with alignment data but lacks the physical adaptability for manual fitting.

justification: Lofting involves translating 2D plans to 3D physical shapes, a task highly amenable to CAD/AI optimization. However, human verification is needed for physical feasibility and material constraints.

justification: Coordination relies on trust, non-verbal cues, and dynamic problem-solving in noisy environments. AI can manage schedules but cannot replicate the social trust required for safety-critical teamwork.

task_description: Inspect welded joints and structural quality
justification: Visual inspection is increasingly augmented by computer vision, but final certification often requires human liability and judgment on subtle defects.

task_description: Document production progress and material usage

justification: Complex assembly involves fitting parts with tight tolerances where visual inspection and manual adjustment are currently superior to automated systems.

task_description: Conduct electrical performance testing and debugging

task_description: Coordinate with quality assurance and design teams

task_description: Adhere to safety protocols and handle hazardous materials
justification: Safety compliance requires situational awareness and ethical judgment regarding hazardous environments that AI cannot fully replicate.

task_description: Execute iron core stacking operations
justification: Physical manipulation of laminated steel requires tactile feedback and fine motor adjustments that current robotics struggle to replicate without human oversight.

task_description: Perform coil winding procedures
justification: Winding requires continuous monitoring of tension and alignment to prevent insulation damage, a task where human dexterity complements automated guidance.

task_description: Assemble transformer components
justification: Complex assembly involves fitting irregular parts where visual inspection and manual adjustment are critical for structural integrity.

task_description: Inspect winding insulation quality
justification: Visual and tactile inspection of insulation defects benefits from AI-enhanced imaging but requires human judgment to validate ambiguous findings.

task_description: Conduct final functional testing
justification: Testing involves interpreting complex electrical data and making safety-critical decisions that AI can assist with but not fully authorize.

task_description: Maintain production equipment
justification: Routine maintenance can be automated, but troubleshooting unexpected mechanical failures still relies on human experience.

task_description: Document manufacturing parameters

task_description: Coordinate with quality control team
